title: Paronychia
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Paronychia is an infection around the nail.
Common features include a painful, red, swollen area around the nail fold.
Pus-filled blisters may occur, especially with bacterial infection.
People with diabetes or fungal nail disease need clinician-directed care and higher-risk handling.
